news.t: What the really rich are doing with their money right now: Goldman Sachs

holdings.infoBox: GNR is an equity ETF with a total of 113 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 5.65%, Exxon Mobil at 4.32%, Nutrien at 4.19%, Shell at 4.12%, and TotalEnergies SE at 3.02%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Global Natural Resources ETF (GNR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Natural Resources index. The fund tracks an index of global companies in natural resources and/or commodity businesses. GNR was launched on Sep 13, 2010 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: What the really rich are doing with their money right now: Goldman Sachs
data.text: When it comes to investing, some people don't think in terms of thousands of dollars, tens of thousands, or even millions.
